title: Dunzo Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Dunzo Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dunzo Logistics! We are hiring a Warehouse Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dunzo Logistics:
Dunzo Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Logistics!
